channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-23 15:57 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Views of Starship in space from a@Starlinksatellite
item.description: Views of Starship in space from a@Starlinksatellite

item.title: @elonmusk: Congratulations@SpaceXteam on an epic first Starship V3 launch & landing! You scored a goal for huma...
item.description: Congratulations@SpaceXteam on an epic first Starship V3 launch & landing! You scored a goal for humanity.

item.title: @elonmusk: Congrats@SpaceXteam and@elonmuskon a hell of a V3 Starship launch. One step closer to the Moon…one s...
item.description: Congrats@SpaceXteam and@elonmuskon a hell of a V3 Starship launch. One step closer to the Moon…one step closer to Mars 🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: We are living in the best timeline If this doesn't inspire instinctual awe in you, I don't know what...
item.description: We are living in the best timeline If this doesn't inspire instinctual awe in you, I don't know what possibly could Humanity will be multi-planetary

item.title: @elonmusk: Lets’s Go@SpaceX!!! You guys are pretty freaking amazing. Wow. Congratulations on the successful lau...
item.description: Lets’s Go@SpaceX!!! You guys are pretty freaking amazing. Wow. Congratulations on the successful launch — and to many, MANY more. 🥂🍾 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: This was the most awe inspiring thing I’ve ever seen. The future will be wildly better than today.
item.description: This was the most awe inspiring thing I’ve ever seen. The future will be wildly better than today.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX team chanting: "USA! USA! USA! USA!" 🇺🇸🚀
item.description: SpaceX team chanting: "USA! USA! USA! USA!" 🇺🇸🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: Congrats and a huge thank you to the SpaceX team that always delivers. This was an incredible first ...
item.description: Congrats and a huge thank you to the SpaceX team that always delivers. This was an incredible first flight of a brand new vehicle. Our collective future flying amongst the stars has become so much closer.

item.title: @elonmusk: It was a very good dayspacex.com/launches/starship…
item.description: It was a very good dayspacex.com/launches/starship…

item.title: @elonmusk: why else are we here if not to live with unreasonable passion for things
item.description: why else are we here if not to live with unreasonable passion for things

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX has just launched and deployed ~45 tons to space. This was one of the heaviest payloads since...
item.description: SpaceX has just launched and deployed ~45 tons to space. This was one of the heaviest payloads since Polyus launched by Energia in 1987 and Skylab launched by Saturn V in 1973!

item.title: @elonmusk: Today SpaceX launched ~45tons of Starlink mass simulators on Starship Flight 12, the highest payload...
item.description: Today SpaceX launched ~45tons of Starlink mass simulators on Starship Flight 12, the highest payload tonnage to space since Saturn V's Skylab (77t) in 1973. This is a huge milestone for spaceflight and cannot be ignored, the future of space and this program is so bright!!

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior...
item.description: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior experience in AI. Smart humans figure it out fast. Please send an email with ~3 bullet points demonstrating evidence of exceptional ability to ai_eng@spacex.com.
